parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id AS subtask_id,
  ANY_VALUE(t.title) AS subtask_title,
  ANY_VALUE(t.created_at) AS subtask_created_on,
  ANY_VALUE(t.target_date) AS subtask_end_on,
  ANY_VALUE(t.status) AS subtask_status,
  ANY_VALUE(t.priority) AS subtask_priority,

  ANY_VALUE(
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(
      DAY,
      DATE(t.target_date),
      DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
    )
  ) AS overdue_days,

  ANY_VALUE(rp.id) AS responsible_person_id,
  ANY_VALUE(rp.firstname) AS responsible_person_firstname,
  ANY_VALUE(rp.lastname) AS responsible_person_lastname,
  ANY_VALUE(rp.email) AS responsible_person_email,

  ANY_VALUE(parent_t.id) AS parent_task_id,
  ANY_VALUE(parent_t.title) AS parent_task_title,

  ANY_VALUE(pm.id) AS project_id,
  ANY_VALUE(pm.title) AS project_title,

  ANY_VALUE(m.id) AS milestone_id,
  ANY_VALUE(m.title) AS milestone_title,

  ANY_VALUE(pmo.id) AS project_manager_id,
  ANY_VALUE(pmo.firstname) AS project_manager_firstname,
  ANY_VALUE(pmo.lastname) AS project_manager_lastname,
  ANY_VALUE(pmo.email) AS project_manager_email,

  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.id ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.firstname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.lastname ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(obs.email ORDER BY obs.id) AS observer_emails

FROM task_managements t

JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN task_managements parent_t
  ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = parent_t.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(t.project_management_id, parent_t.project_management_id)

LEFT JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  DATE(t.target_date) < DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
  AND t.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed', 'on_hold')
  AND t.parent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND rp.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84)

GROUP BY t.id;

parameters.subject: =SubTask Overdue: Immediate Attention Required – {{$json.subtask_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.project_manager_firstname}} {{$json.project_manager_lastname}},

The subtask {{$json.subtask_title}} has exceeded its planned due date and is currently overdue.

Overdue Details

Subtask Title {{$json.subtask_title}}
Subtask Created On {{$json.subtask_created_on}}
Subtask End On {{$json.subtask_end_on}}
Current Status {{$json.subtask_status}}
Overdue By {{$json.overdue_days}} days
Responsible Owner {{$json.responsible_person_firstname}} {{$json.responsible_person_lastname}}
Parent Task {{$json.parent_task_title || 'N/A'}}
Project {{$json.project_title}}
Milestone {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Task Link View Task Details

Please update the task with completion details or provide a revised plan to avoid escalation.

Regards,
PMO – Escalation Desk

parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- =========================
  -- SUBTASK
  -- =========================
  t.id                       AS subtask_id,
  t.title                    AS subtask_title,
  t.created_at                AS subtask_created_on,
  t.target_date               AS subtask_end_on,
  t.status                    AS subtask_status,
  t.priority                  AS subtask_priority,

  -- overdue calculation
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(
    DAY,
    DATE(t.target_date),
    DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())
  )                           AS overdue_days,

  -- responsible person (task owner)
  rp.id                       AS responsible_person_id,
  rp.firstname                AS responsible_person_firstname,
  rp.lastname                 AS responsible_person_lastname,
  rp.email                    AS responsible_person_email,

  -- =========================
  -- PARENT TASK
  -- =========================
  parent_t.id                 AS parent_task_id,
  parent_t.title              AS parent_task_title,

  -- =========================
  -- PROJECT (via self OR parent)
  -- =========================
  pm.id                       AS project_id,
  pm.title                    AS project_title,

  -- =========================
  -- MILESTONE (via parent task)
  -- =========================
  m.id                        AS milestone_id,
  m.title                     AS milestone_title,

  -- =========================
  -- PROJECT MANAGER
  -- =========================
  pmo.id                      AS project_manager_id,
  pmo.firstname               AS project_manager_firstname,
  pmo.lastname                AS project_manager_lastname,
  pmo.email                   AS project_manager_email

FROM task_managements t

-- responsible person (task owner)
JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- parent task
LEFT JOIN task_managements parent_t
  ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id

-- milestone via parent task
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = parent_t.milestone_id

-- project via self or parent
LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(t.project_management_id, parent_t.project_management_id)

-- project manager
LEFT JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

WHERE
  DATE(t.target_date) < DATE(UTC_TIMESTAMP())   -- overdue
  AND t.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed')   -- ignore completed tasks
  AND t.parent_id IS NOT NULL;                  -- only subtasks

parameters.html:
=

Dear {{ $json.observer_first_name }} {{ $json.observer_last_name }},

The subtask {{$json.subtask_title}} has exceeded its planned due date and is currently overdue.

Overdue Details

Subtask Title {{$json.subtask_title}}
Subtask Created On {{$json.subtask_created_on}}
Subtask End On {{$json.subtask_end_on}}
Current Status {{$json.subtask_status}}
Overdue By {{$json.overdue_days}} days

parameters.subject: =SubTask Overdue: Immediate Attention Required – {{$json.total_overdue_subtasks}} subtasks have been overdue.
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.task_owner_name}},

You have {{$json.total_overdue_subtasks}} overdue subtask(s).

Overdue Subtasks Details

{{ $json.tasks.map(task => ` `).join('') }}
Subtask Owner Parent Task Project Milestone Status Overdue Days Link
${task.subtask_title} ${$json.task_owner_name} ${task.parent_task_title} ${task.project_title || 'N/A'} ${task.milestone_title || 'N/A'} ${task.subtask_status} ${task.overdue_days} View

Please take necessary action on all overdue subtasks.

Regards,
PMO – Escalation Desk

parameters.subject: =SubTasks Overdue in your projects: {{$json.total_overdue_subtasks}} have been overdue in your projects.
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.pm_name}},

Below are the overdue subtasks in the project you are managing and this require your attention.

Total Overdue Subtasks: {{$json.total_overdue_subtasks}}

{{ $json.tasks.map(task => ` `).join('') }}
Subtask Created On Due Date Overdue Days Status Priority Owner Project Parent Task Link
${task.subtask_title} ${task.subtask_created_on} ${task.subtask_end_on} ${task.overdue_days} days ${task.subtask_status} ${task.subtask_priority || 'N/A'} ${task.responsible_person_firstname} ${task.responsible_person_lastname} ${task.project_title || 'N/A'} ${task.parent_task_title || 'N/A'} Open

As a Project Manager, Please ensure timely closure or update of these subtasks.

Regards,
PMO – Escalation Desk
